# RabbitEmergency.com

> Educational rabbit-emergency triage for owners across Asia, now available in English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Thai. Not a substitute for veterinary care.

## Languages
- English: https://rabbitemergency.com/
- Japanese: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/
- Traditional Chinese: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/
- Thai: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/

## Sitemap
- https://rabbitemergency.com/sitemap.xml


## Shareable rabbit emergency printables
- [Rabbit cannot pee call-prep sheet](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-cannot-pee-call-sheet/)
- [Rabbit toxic plant exposure log](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-toxic-plant-exposure-log/)
- [Rabbit ate acetaminophen/paracetamol](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-ate-acetaminophen-paracetamol/)
- [Rabbit acetaminophen/paracetamol exposure log](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-acetaminophen-paracetamol-exposure-log/)
- [Rabbit breathing emergency transport sheet](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-breathing-emergency-transport-sheet/)
- [What to tell the emergency vet for a rabbit](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-emergency-vet-handoff-sheet/)

## Rabbit emergency signs hub
- [Rabbit Emergency Signs: 100 Warning Signs and When to Go Now](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [うさぎの救急サイン: 今すぐ受診すべき100の警告](https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [兔子急症警訊：100個需要立即就醫的警告](https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [สัญญาณฉุกเฉินของกระต่าย: 100 อาการเตือนที่ควรไปพบสัตวแพทย์ทันที](https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-emergency-signs/): 100 source-cited sign-specific triage pages for rabbit owners.
- [Rabbit weight loss](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/): Weight loss with drooling, poor appetite, small droppings, diarrhea, or lethargy needs veterinary assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-weight-loss-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit baby rabbit diarrhea](https://rabbitemergency.com/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/): Diarrhea in a baby rabbit can become life-threatening quickly and needs urgent care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/baby-rabbit-diarrhea-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit wet front paws](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/): Wet front paws can come from nasal discharge; paired with sneezing, poor appetite, or noisy breathing, it needs vet care.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-wet-front-paws-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit pale gums](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/): Pale or blue gums, weakness, collapse, bleeding, or breathing trouble means emergency care now.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-pale-gums-emergency-signs/
- [Rabbit pressing head](https://rabbitemergency.com/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/): Head pressing, severe disorientation, seizure, weakness, or toxin risk needs emergency assessment.
  - 日本語: https://rabbitemergency.com/ja/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
  - 繁體中文: https://rabbitemergency.com/zh-tw/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
  - ไทย: https://rabbitemergency.com/th/rabbit-pressing-head-emergency-signs/
